scripts.build: node scripts/clean.mjs dist && cross-env VITE_EXT_TARGET=popup vite build && cross-env VITE_EXT_TARGET=background vite build && cross-env VITE_EXT_TARGET=content vite build && cross-env VITE_EXT_TARGET=youtube vite build && node scripts/post-build.mjs
scripts.build:firefox: node scripts/clean.mjs dist-firefox && cross-env VITE_EXT_TARGET=popup VITE_EXT_OUTDIR=dist-firefox vite build && cross-env VITE_EXT_TARGET=background VITE_EXT_OUTDIR=dist-firefox vite build && cross-env VITE_EXT_TARGET=content VITE_EXT_OUTDIR=dist-firefox vite build && cross-env VITE_FIREFOX=1 node scripts/post-build.mjs
